title: Currents of War :: Unity Game
description:
Currents of War 2025
     A turn-based item-selling strategy game
       Sell items to shift heroes' chances of winning in battle
         Make a profit!

    Languages - Unity - C#, HLSL;  Python for pipeline tools
    
     A 'NPC Simulator' game made in Unity for the April 2025 itch.

media.caption: Currents of War!! You are the shopkeeper! Its Action Packed Money Making Action!!!
Character Color Data, Light Normals, & Animation Atlases Each row is a different armor/class type. Each column is a frame of Idle, Walk, or Talk animations.
Changing character's look & colors in Unity's Editor real-time!
Gotta show the time of day somehow!
The sunlight rig to make a data texture in HoudiniUsing a mesh, I can shape the light on 'walls' in the scene easier.
Fish Armor is not for sale! FEEEEESSSSHHH!
